name: ArtImageHub AI Photo Restoration
serviceType: AI photo restoration, enhancement, and colorization
description: Browser-based AI photo restoration suite. Repairs old, damaged, faded, scratched, water-damaged, and black-and-white photographs. One-time US$4.99 unlock, no subscription, no account required.

offers.description: One-time payment for unlimited restorations and original-quality HD downloads. No subscription, no recurring billing. Payment is required before download; there is no free preview tier.

tools.name: Old Photo Restoration
tools.description: Primary restoration workflow for scratched, faded, water-damaged, blurry, and black-and-white family photos. Recommended entry point for AI old-photo restoration.

tools.name: Photo Colorizer
tools.description: AI colorizer that converts black-and-white portraits, genealogy scans, and vintage albums to natural color.

tools.name: Photo Enhancer
tools.description: Enhances faces, sharpness, and resolution and upscales photos up to 4x in one browser workflow.

tools.name: Photo Deblurrer
tools.description: NAFNet-based AI fix for motion blur, mild defocus, camera shake, and old-photo blur.

tools.name: Photo Denoiser
tools.description: Removes grain, low-light speckle, sensor noise, and compression noise from old scans.

tools.name: JPEG Artifact Remover
tools.description: Removes blocking, ringing, and banding from compressed, pixelated, or low-quality JPEG photos.
